ddls:
CREATE TABLE "geo_levels" (
  "geo_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geographical level */,
  "geo_level_name" TEXT /* Name of the geographical level */,
  "geo_level_type" TEXT /* Type of geographical level (e.g., country, region, city) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("geo_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "building_owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the buildings table */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the owner */,
  "owner_type" TEXT /* Type of owner (e.g., individual, organization) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "building_secondary_uses" (
  "secondary_use_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each secondary use */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the buildings table */,
  "secondary_use_type" TEXT /* Type of secondary use (e.g., agriculture, hotel, rental) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("secondary_use_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "building_construction_materials" (
  "construction_material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each construction material */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the buildings table */,
  "material_type" TEXT /* Type of construction material (e.g., adobe mud, mud mortar stone, stone flag) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("construction_material_id")
)
